en: A little place on the Pacific Ocean. You know what the Mexicans say about the Pacific?
ko: 멕시코 사람들이 태평양에 대해 뭐라고 하는지 알아?

en: No. They say it has no memory.
That's where I want to live the rest of my life.
A warm place with no memory.
Open up a little hotel. Ride on the beach.
Buy some worthless old boat and fix it up new.
Take my guests out charter fishing.
In a place like that, I could use a man that knows how to get things.
ko: 그런 곳에서는 일을 잘 아는 사람이 필요해.

en: I don't think I could make it on the outside, Andy.
ko: 나는 밖에서 잘 지낼 수 있을 것 같지 않아.
